title: PMS Special Dad Memorial Heart Ornament – Grey Rose Polyresin Graveside Stone with Diamantes – Thoughtful Sympathy Tribute Keepsake for Remembrance – 16 x 14 cm
features: MEANINGFUL TRIBUTE – Heart-shaped memorial ornament dedicated to a special dad, featuring a comforting engraved message of remembrance.
GREY ROSE DESIGN – Finished with subtle grey rose detailing and sparkling diamantes for an elegant, understated memorial display.
DURABLE POLYRESIN – Made from weather-resistant polyresin, suitable for indoor or outdoor remembrance spaces including gravesides and memorial gardens.
IDEAL SIZE – Measures 16 cm x 14 cm x 7 cm, a practical size for placing on headstones, grave plots, garden memorials or remembrance shelves at home.
SYMPATHY GIFT – A thoughtful keepsake to comfort someone grieving the loss of a father and a touching way to keep cherished memories close.
description: Create a heartfelt tribute with the PMS Special Dad Memorial Heart Ornament, a beautifully crafted remembrance stone designed to honour the life and memory of a much-loved father. Made from durable polyresin, this memorial keepsake features a smooth, speckled stone finish and an elegant heart shape, symbolising love, remembrance and everlasting connection. The engraved message, “Special Dad – Never more than a thought away, loved & remembered every day,” offers a comforting reminder that those we cherish remain forever close in our hearts. Subtle grey rose detailing and sparkling diamantes add a gentle decorative touch, making the ornament suitable for gravesides, memorial gardens, remembrance corners at home, or as part of a thoughtful condolence gift. Designed to withstand outdoor conditions, this sturdy ornament is weather-resistant and heavy enough to stay securely in place while still being easy to reposition. Measuring 16 cm x 14 cm x 7 cm, it is a practical size for placing on a headstone ledge, graveside, or thoughtful home display. Whether given to someone grieving or used to create your own memorial space, the PMS Special Dad Memorial Heart Ornament provides a meaningful expression of love, loss and remembrance. Its timeless design ensures it will continue offering comfort and reflection for years to come.
